title: dracaena nilotica
intro: Dracaena nilotica, also known as the Nile dragon tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, and is also believed to have antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects, providing several health benefits. Dracaena nilotica is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and the leaves and roots are also used to make medicinal extracts and tinctures.
